title: ONEOK Financial Results Should Improve In The Winter Season
text: Due to higher NGL raw feed throughput volumes in the second half of 2022, ONEOK NGL segment's adjusted EBITDA will increase. Due to increasing natural gas consumption and dry natural gas production, OKE natural gas G&P segment's adjusted EBITDA in 2H 2022 and 1H 2023 will improve.
